canonical_definition: The ability of a model to process and comprehend long sequences of interleaved multimodal inputs, such as video frames and text subtitles, to perform complex reasoning tasks.
papers: LongVideoBench: A Benchmark for Long-context Interleaved Video-Language Understanding

definitions.paper: LongVideoBench: A Benchmark for Long-context Interleaved Video-Language Understanding

definitions.text: The latent ability of a model to understand, integrate, and reason about information from long documents containing interleaved text and images.
